summary: Embassy Post Review and Executive Team meetings held this morning; CTI USA Financial Meeting canceled by Jordan Eliades. Two Stripe payments totaling $8,130 collected from Indonesian J-1 participants and one visa approval recorded (Tran Thien Huong). CIEE escalated 10 open Indonesia visa denials requiring ARF resubmission for July starts; Holland America advanced DSA/Beverage Runner candidates toward pilot training.
